scripts.generate: bun run scripts/generate.ts && oxfmt --write src && oxlint --fix src
scripts.specs:fetch: git submodule update --force --init --recursive specs/distilled-spec-gcp && git -C specs/distilled-spec-gcp checkout -- .
scripts.specs:update: git -C specs/distilled-spec-gcp fetch && git -C specs/distilled-spec-gcp checkout main && git -C specs/distilled-spec-gcp pull
